title: Digital Microfluidics, Gene/Disease Diagnostics & Exosome Preparation
titleZh: 數位微流體、基因／疾病診斷與外泌體製備
tagline: Programmable droplets from sample preparation to molecular readout
taglineZh: 從樣品前處理到分子讀出的可程式化液滴
why: Digital microfluidics turns droplets into programmable laboratory units. By moving, mixing, splitting, and metering nanolitre-scale droplets with electrical signals, it can simplify preparation for gene and disease diagnostics while enabling exosome preparation and analysis workflows.
whyZh: 數位微流體把液滴變成可程式化的實驗單元。以電訊號移動、混合、分裂與定量奈升尺度液滴，可簡化基因／疾病診斷的前處理，也支援外泌體製備與分析流程。
challenge: Uniform droplets, low sample loss, reliable actuation, and integration of biological preparation steps must work together.
challengeZh: 均一液滴、低樣品損耗、可靠驅動與生物前處理步驟的整合，必須同時成立。
innovation: Frequency-controlled parallel-plate EWOD provides a simple control handle for either uniform or intentionally unequal droplet volumes, supporting reagent metering, serial dilution, and multiplex assays.
innovationZh: 頻率控制的平行板 EWOD 提供簡潔的操控參數，可產生均一或刻意不等體積的液滴，支援試劑定量、序列稀釋與多重檢測。
evidence: At 1 kHz: about 20 uniform droplets near 8 nL
At 500 Hz: two droplet populations near 10 nL and 7 nL
Programmable transport, mixing, splitting, and dispensing
DMF workflows for exosome isolation, engineering, and hydrogel encapsulation
evidenceZh: 1 kHz：可生成約 20 顆、接近 8 nL 的均一液滴
500 Hz：形成約 10 nL 與 7 nL 的兩種液滴族群
可程式化輸送、混合、分裂與分注
發展外泌體分離、工程化與水凝膠包覆的 DMF 流程
future: Link programmable droplets to robust exosome preparation, on-chip wash and lysis, and molecular readout preparation.
futureZh: 把可程式化液滴串連至穩定的外泌體製備、晶片上清洗與裂解，以及分子讀出前處理。
connects: Provides the sample-handling foundation for biosensing, precision health, and AI-enabled interpretation.
connectsZh: 為生醫感測、精準健康與 AI 判讀提供樣品操作基礎。

media.title: Digital microfluidics research
media.description: A direct look at programmable droplet manipulation and its research possibilities.
media.descriptionZh: 直接認識可程式化液滴操控與其研究可能性。

title: Wearable, Flexible & Self-Powered Biosensing
titleZh: 穿戴式、柔性與自供電生醫感測
tagline: Human-centred sensing for continuous physiological insight
taglineZh: 以人為本的連續生理感測
why: Wearable devices must be comfortable, sensitive, low-cost, and dependable enough to capture meaningful signals in daily life.
whyZh: 穿戴式裝置必須兼具舒適、高靈敏、低成本與可靠性，才能在日常生活中捕捉有意義的生理訊號。
challenge: Sensitivity, range, repeatability, power use, and clinical relevance often pull in different directions.
challengeZh: 靈敏度、量測範圍、重複性、耗電與臨床價值常彼此拉扯。
innovation: Origami and paper architectures, nanomaterials, low-power electronics, and energy-autonomous strategies create practical multimodal sensing platforms.
innovationZh: 摺紙與紙基結構、奈米材料、低功耗電子與能源自主策略，共同形成實用的多模態感測平台。
evidence: Sensitivity up to about 3.75 kPa⁻¹
Range up to about 20 kPa
10,000-cycle evaluation
Pulse, posture, bruxism, and trigger-finger demonstrations
evidenceZh: 靈敏度最高約 3.75 kPa⁻¹
量測範圍最高約 20 kPa
10,000 次循環測試
脈搏、姿態、磨牙與扳機指展示
future: Multimodal e-skin, washable and self-powered integration, and deployment from wellness to clinical monitoring.
futureZh: 多模態電子皮膚、可清洗與自供電整合，以及從健康管理到臨床監測的應用。
connects: Generates continuous signals that become actionable through AI models and validation.
connectsZh: 產生連續訊號，再透過 AI 模型與驗證轉化為可行動資訊。

title: AI-Enabled Precision Health
tagline: Integrating sensing, patient context, and data-driven decisions
taglineZh: 整合感測、個人化資訊與資料驅動決策
why: Intermittent measurements cannot fully reflect treatment response or emerging risk; useful precision health needs continuous data in context.
whyZh: 間歇量測無法完整反映治療反應與即將出現的風險；有價值的精準健康需要脈絡化的連續資料。
challenge: Optical overlap, patient variation, and machine artifacts complicate trustworthy real-time prediction.
challengeZh: 光學訊號重疊、個體差異與設備干擾，使可信的即時預測更具挑戰。
innovation: The hemodialysis platform combines multi-wavelength optical sensing, patient-specific variables, and machine learning.
innovationZh: 血液透析平台結合多波長光學感測、個人化變項與機器學習。
evidence: Thirty sessions from nine ESRD patients
One-minute monitoring over about four hours
Prediction of six clinically relevant biomarkers
R² around 0.95 for several toxin predictions
evidenceZh: 九位 ESRD 病人、三十次療程
約四小時療程中每分鐘監測
預測六項臨床重要指標
多項尿毒素預測 R² 約達 0.95
future: Multicentre validation, explainable AI, and integration with wearable sensing.
futureZh: 多中心驗證、可解釋 AI，以及與穿戴式感測整合。
connects: Converts data from microfluidic and wearable platforms into personalised health decisions.
connectsZh: 將微流體與穿戴式平台的資料轉化為個人化健康決策。

title: Adaptive Bioinspired Systems
tagline: Soft materials and intelligent actuation for safe interaction
taglineZh: 以軟性材料與智慧驅動實現安全互動
why: Healthcare and agricultural systems need to interact safely and precisely with people, cells, and living environments.
whyZh: 健康與農業系統必須安全、精準地與人、細胞及生命環境互動。
challenge: Controlled soft motion, sensing integration, and robust operation must be achieved without sacrificing simplicity.
challengeZh: 可控軟性運動、感測整合與穩定操作，必須在不犧牲簡潔性的前提下達成。
innovation: Programmed magnetic materials enable biomimetic actuation from microhand manipulation to compliant grasping.
innovationZh: 可程式化磁性材料實現從微型手部操控到柔順抓取的仿生驅動。
evidence: About 70° flower-petal rotation
Four-finger robot in air and water
Microhand manipulation demonstrations
Magnetic soft-material actuation
evidenceZh: 花瓣旋轉約 70°
四指機器人可於空氣與水中操作
微型仿生手操控展示
磁性軟材料驅動
future: Integrated sensing, closed-loop control, assistive robots, and smart agriculture.
futureZh: 整合感測、閉迴路控制、輔助型機器人與智慧農業。
connects: Extends sensing and AI into safe physical action in real environments.
connectsZh: 將感測與 AI 延伸至真實環境中的安全實體行動。

title: Acoustofluidic Filtration
tagline: Bubble streaming for rapid separation and fouling control
taglineZh: 以氣泡聲流實現快速分離與抗污染
why: Microscale filtration is powerful but can quickly foul. Our bubble-based acoustofluidic platform restores flow while separating cells and particles.
whyZh: 微尺度過濾雖具高選擇性，卻容易因顆粒堆積而阻塞；本團隊利用氣泡聲流恢復流動並完成細胞與顆粒分離。
challenge: Maintain throughput, recovery, and sample integrity in complex mixtures.
challengeZh: 在複雜樣品中同時維持通量、回收率與樣品完整性。
innovation: Cross-flow filtration and oscillating bubbles create local streaming that clears the filter surface.
innovationZh: 錯流過濾結合振盪氣泡，形成局部聲流以清除濾膜表面。
evidence: Fouling removal in about 0.5 s
Sperm recovery around 91.7–97.8%
Purity around 74.6–89.3%
Successful downstream STR profiling
evidenceZh: 約 0.5 秒移除污染層
後續 STR 分析成功
future: Stable bubbles, higher throughput, and integrated molecular analysis.
futureZh: 提升氣泡穩定性、通量並整合分子分析。
connects: Adds robust sample preparation to microfluidic and diagnostic systems.
connectsZh: 為微流體與診斷系統補上可靠的樣品前處理能力。

title: Electro-Controlled Microfluidics for Exosome Engineering
titleZh: 電控微流體外泌體工程與分析
tagline: Preparing, engineering, and analysing extracellular vesicles on chip
taglineZh: 在晶片上進行外泌體製備、工程化與分析
why: Exosomes carry molecular signals but their preparation can be slow, sample-intensive, and difficult to standardise. Controlled droplets offer a compact way to make each preparation step visible and repeatable.
whyZh: 外泌體攜帶分子訊號，但其製備常耗時、耗樣品且不易標準化。受控液滴提供一條精簡途徑，讓每一步準備都更可見、可重複。
challenge: Capture efficiency, wash steps, sample compatibility, and downstream analysis must be balanced within very small volumes.
challengeZh: 捕捉效率、清洗步驟、樣品相容性與後續分析，必須在極小體積中取得平衡。
innovation: Electrically controlled microfluidics combines droplet transport with exosome isolation, loading or functionalisation, hydrogel encapsulation, and online functional analysis.
innovationZh: 電控微流體結合液滴輸送與外泌體分離、載入或功能化、水凝膠包覆及線上功能分析。
evidence: DMF workflow development for isolation and engineering
Hydrogel encapsulation concept
Small-volume, programmable wash and lysis steps
Compatible route toward molecular readout preparation
evidenceZh: 建立外泌體分離與工程化的 DMF 流程
水凝膠包覆概念
小體積、可程式化清洗與裂解步驟
可延伸至分子讀出前處理
applicationsZh: miRNA 與分子分析前處理
future: Validate repeatable preparation workflows and integrate them with gene/disease diagnostic assays.
futureZh: 驗證可重複的製備流程，並與基因／疾病診斷檢測整合。
connects: Extends digital microfluidics from droplets to extracellular-vesicle workflows and molecular diagnostics.
connectsZh: 把數位微流體從液滴操控延伸至胞外囊泡流程與分子診斷。
